keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Derek Cornelius (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Canada 1, Qatar 0. Cyle Larin (Canada) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner following a corner.
Delay in match because of an injury Boualem Khoukhi (Qatar).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! Canada 2, Qatar 0. Jonathan David (Canada) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom right corner.
Homam El Amin (Qatar) is shown the red card.
Substitution, Qatar. Sultan Al Brake replaces Yusuf Abdurisag.
Goal! Canada 3, Qatar 0. Jonathan David (Canada) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal.
Substitution, Qatar. Ahmed Fathy replaces Edmílson Junior.
Substitution, Qatar. Mohammad Al Manai replaces Jassem Gaber.
Substitution, Canada. Moïse Bombito replaces Derek Cornelius.
Second Half begins Canada 3, Qatar 0.
Delay in match because of an injury Ismaël Koné (Canada).
Delay in match (Qatar). VAR checking.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Assim Madibo (Qatar) is shown the red card.
Substitution, Canada. Nathan Saliba replaces Ismaël Koné because of an injury.
Substitution, Qatar. Al Hashmi Al Hussain replaces Akram Afif.
Ahmed Fathy (Qatar) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Canada 4, Qatar 0. Nathan Saliba (Canada) from a free kick with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Delay in match because of an injury Mahmoud Abunada (Qatar).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Canada. Jacob Shaffelburg replaces Luc De Fougerolles.
Substitution, Canada. Tani Oluwaseyi replaces Ali Ahmed.
Own Goal by Mohammad Al Manai, Qatar. Canada 5, Qatar 0.
Delay in match because of an injury Mahmoud Abunada (Qatar).
Substitution, Canada. Niko Sigur replaces Tajon Buchanan.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Qatar. Lucas Mendes replaces Ahmed Fathy.
Goal! Canada 6, Qatar 0. Jonathan David (Canada) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Nathan Saliba.
